title: Skyblock Simplified
description: Skyblock Simplified is a Hypixel Skyblock modpack with performance boosts, QoL improvements, and essential tools.
body:
# Welcome to Skyblock Simplified!

Skyblock Simplified is a modpack built for Hypixel Skyblock players looking to improve their experience without the hassle of installing each mod separately. This carefully selected collection enhances gameplay, boosts performance, and adds quality-of-life improvements, making Skyblock smoother and more enjoyable.

## 📢 Important Info 📢
- 🛠️ For some resource packs and optimizations, [Optifine](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M5.jar)
 must be installed separately.
- 💾 It is recommended to allocate atleast **4GB** of RAM for a smooth gameplay experience

## 📜 Mods List 📜

<details>
<summary>Skyblock Mods</summary>

- [Chat Triggers](https://modrinth.com/mod/chattriggers)
- [Fancy Warp Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancy-warp-menu)
- [Not Enough Updates](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughupdates)
- [Odin](https://github.com/odtheking/Odin/releases)
- [Skyblock Addons]([https://biscuit.codes/mods/skyblockaddons/](https://biscuit.codes/mods/skyblockaddons/))
- [Sky Hanni](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyhanni)
- [Skytils](https://github.com/Skytils/SkytilsMod/releases)
- [Dungeons Guide](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-guide)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Misc Mods</summary>

- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling)
- [Crash Patch](https://modrinth.com/mod/crashpatch)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)
- [Foam Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/foamfix)
- [Great Scrollable Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/great-scrollable-tooltips)
- [Intentory Hud](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge)
- [Patcher](https://sk1er.club/mods/patcher)
- [Quick Quit](https://modrinth.com/mod/quickquit)
- [Replay Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod)

</details>
